label: Root Cockpit Mac mini tunnel
updateRequiredMessage: Root Cockpit 0.1.43 is required. This release splits Documents into its own section and replaces Command Board with the shared public canvas.
message: Root Cockpit 0.1.43 is available: Documents is now its own section and Command Board is a shared public canvas with sticky notes, authorship, drawing, highlighter, text, shapes, votes, inspector controls, zoom/pan, and local shared-board persistence.
